title: 没有「身份证」的 Agent，接管不了世界 | 原文
content: The article discusses the rise of AI agents and the need for trust and security as they become everyday tools. It highlights the anxiety and excitement in the tech community, from small business owners to independent developers, driven by the desire to stay ahead and avoid retaliation. Recent warnings from China’s Ministry of Industry and Information Technology about malicious code in new agent formats underscore the importance of safeguarding these systems. The piece calls for deliberate focus on ensuring agents are safe and trustworthy.

title: 谷歌云推出新款AI芯片及用于构建智能代理的工具
content: Google Cloud has released new AI‑processing chips and accompanying software designed to help developers create intelligent agents and applications. The updated hardware promises faster, more efficient inference for machine‑learning models, while the tools provide streamlined integration, deployment, and management of AI services. Together, the chips and software aim to accelerate the development of advanced AI features across Google Cloud’s platform.

title: 布鲁塞尔推出能源方案以缓解燃料成本飙升的影响
content: Brussels announced an energy package aimed at easing the impact of rising fuel costs. The initiative outlines measures to help households and businesses manage higher energy prices, including subsidies, price caps, or support schemes, though specific details were not fully disclosed. The proposal reflects the EU’s effort to mitigate the economic strain caused by recent surges in fuel and oil prices across Europe.

title: 坐厕 or 蹲厕，究竟哪一个更卫生安全？两项研究揭示：家庭卫生间的细菌数量是公共卫生间的10到1000倍；蹲厕气溶胶风险比坐厕更高 | 原文
content: Both public and private toilets contain bacteria, but studies show that household bathrooms have 10 to 1,000 times more bacteria than public ones. However, public toilets pose a higher aerosol risk because squat toilets generate more airborne particles than seated toilets. Thus, while home bathrooms are generally dirtier in terms of bacterial load, public toilets, especially squat ones, may present a greater chance of airborne exposure.
eventKey: 究竟哪一个更卫生安全-两项研究揭示-家庭卫生间的细菌数量是公共卫生间的10到1000倍-蹲厕气溶胶风险比坐厕更高

title: 论斤卖的蓝莓，猪都快吃腻了
content:

蓝莓的价格跳水，起初被称为“腰斩”，没多久又发展成了“膝斩”，而按目前情况，已经可以用“脚斩”来形容了。

title: 郭明錤评苹果 CEO 交接：特努斯凭芯片上位，对外事务仍需库克
content: Apple analyst Ming-Chi Kuo says CEO transition to John T. Connor highlights his success moving Macs from Intel to Apple silicon, showcasing strong execution and cross‑department coordination. Connor’s background in system and platform transformation aligns with Apple’s shift toward edge AI. While his tenure may maintain supply‑chain efficiencies established by Tim Cook, regional political work, especially in Asia, still likely relies on Cook’s experience. Changes at major assembler Foxconn may help sustain collaboration during the leadership transition.
